title: Truth cleanup: docs and Birdeye budget mode
summary: Align dashboard truth classification so Birdeye cooldown/rate-limit discovery failures cannot appear healthy, and align README truth model language with current Jupiter-first and reconciliation-aware behavior.
why_safe: Small, explicit dashboard truth-classification floor for Birdeye failure signals; no trading logic redesign.
Focused tests cover the cooldown/rate-limit healthy-classification regression.
README changes are descriptive and operator-focused only.

expected_results.tests: Birdeye truth classification tests pass and validation gate accepts scoped files.

commit_message: Align truth docs and fix Birdeye budget classification
notes_for_cursor: Task scope intentionally limited to dashboard truth classification + focused regression tests + README alignment.
